question_en: Which of the following waterways has been declared as National Waterway No. 2 by the Government?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित जलमार्गों में से किस जलमार्ग को सरकार द्वारा राष्ट्रीय जलमार्ग संख्या 2 के रूप में घोषित किया गया है ?
options_en: Ganga river between Allahabad and Haldia (1620 km)
Brahmaputra river between Sadiya and Dhubri (891 km)
West Coast Canal in Kerala (Kottapuram - Kollam, Udyogmandal and Champakara canals - 205 km)
Specified stretches of Godavari and Krishna rivers along with Kakinada - Puducherry canal stretch (1078 km)
options_hi: इलाहाबाद और हल्दिया के मध्य गंगा नदी (1620 कि.मी.)
सदिया और धुबरी के मध्य ब्रह्मपुत्र नदी (891 कि.मी.)
केरल में पश्चिम-तटीय नहर (कोट्टापुरम – कोल्लम, उद्योगमंडल व चंपक्कारा नहरें – 205 कि.मी.)
काकीनाडा – पुदुच्चेरी नहर स्ट्रेच के साथ-साथ गोदावरी और कृष्णा नदियों के निर्दिष्ट भाग (1078 कि.मी.)
subject: general-awareness
explanation: National Waterway 2 (NW-2) spans the Brahmaputra River between Sadiya and Dhubri in Assam, covering a length of 891 km.
fingerprint: which of the following waterways has been declared as national waterway no 2 by the government

question_en: What is the public sale of a part of the equity of a Public Sector Enterprise (PSE) called?
question_hi: किसी सरकारी क्षेत्र के उपक्रम (पी.एस.ई.) की इक्विटी के एक भाग को सार्वजनिक रूप से बेचना क्या कहलाता है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Disinvestment involves the government selling off its stakes or equity in public sector enterprises to private entities or the public.
fingerprint: what is the public sale of a part of the equity of a public sector enterprise pse called

question_en: In a market equilibrium diagram, if the demand curve shifts to the left and simultaneously the supply curve shifts to the right, what effect will be seen on the equilibrium price?
question_hi: बाज़ार संतुलन रेखाचित्र में, यदि माँग वक्र बाईं ओर को शिफ्ट करता है तथा साथ ही पूर्ति वक्र दाईं ओर को शिफ्ट करता है, तो संतुलन की कीमत पर क्या प्रभाव दिखेगा ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Wait, standard economics dictates the price drops, but the official key is Will increase (बढ़ेगा). This may be a tricky reading of the graph parameters in the original paper or an official key error, but we strictly record the original key.
fingerprint: in a market equilibrium diagram if the demand curve shifts to the left and simultaneously the supply curve shifts to the right what effect will be seen on the equilibrium price

question_en: In which university was India's first nationalist art school established in the year 1919?
question_hi: भारत का पहला राष्ट्रवादी कला विद्यालय वर्ष 1919 में किस विश्वविद्यालय में स्थापित किया गया था ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Kala Bhavana, the first nationalist art school in India, was established in 1919 at Visva-Bharati University by Rabindranath Tagore.
fingerprint: in which university was indias first nationalist art school established in the year 1919

question_en: Which of the following was/were the main feature(s) of the 'Subsidiary Alliance', a system devised by the British in colonial India? (a) It was created by Lord Wellesley. (b) A British military contingent would be stationed in the territory of the ally. (c) The ally could not enter into any treaty with another ruler. (d) The British would protect the ally only from internal challenges.
question_hi: औपनिवेशिक भारत में अंग्रेजों द्वारा तैयार की गई एक व्यवस्था, 'सहायक संधि', की मुख्य विशेषता(एँ) निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी थी/थीं ? (a) इसे लॉर्ड वेलेज़्ली द्वारा बनाया गया था । (b) सहयोगी पक्ष के भू-क्षेत्र में एक ब्रिटिश सैनिक टुकड़ी तैनात रहेगी। (c) सहयोगी पक्ष किसी अन्य शासक के साथ कोई संधि नहीं कर सकेगा। (d) ब्रिटिश सहयोगी पक्ष की केवल आंतरिक चुनौतियों से रक्षा करेंगे।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The Subsidiary Alliance required the ally to maintain British troops and abstain from independent foreign relations, and the British promised protection from both internal and external threats, rendering statement (d) incorrect.
fingerprint: which of the following waswere the main features of the subsidiary alliance a system devised by the british in colonial india a it was created by lord wellesley b a british military contingent would be stationed in the territory of the ally c the ally could not enter into any treaty with another ruler d the british would protect the ally only from internal challenges

question_en: Which of the following countries are examples of forming a 'coming together' federation? (a) India (b) United States of America (c) Australia (d) Spain
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-से देश ‘साथ आकर’ संघ बनाने के उदाहरण हैं ? (a) भारत (b) संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका (c) ऑस्ट्रेलिया (d) स्पेन
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The USA and Australia are prime examples of 'coming together' federations, where independent states join together to form a bigger, stronger unit.
fingerprint: which of the following countries are examples of forming a coming together federation a india b united states of america c australia d spain

question_en: Which of the following statement(s) is/are correct regarding the amendment of the Constitution of India? (a) Parliament has the power to amend any part of the Constitution except Part III. (b) A Constitution Amendment Bill can be introduced only in the Lok Sabha. (c) A Constitution Amendment Bill requires the assent of the President after being passed.
question_hi: भारत के संविधान में संशोधन करने के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा/से कथन सही है/हैं ? (a) संसद को भाग III को छोड़कर संविधान के किसी भी भाग को संशोधित करने की शक्ति है। (b) संविधान संशोधन विधेयक केवल लोक सभा में ही पेश किया जा सकता है। (c) संविधान संशोधन विधेयक को पारित किए जाने के बाद राष्ट्रपति की अनुमति की आवश्यकता होती है ।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Parliament can amend Part III (Fundamental Rights), so (a) is incorrect. The bill can be introduced in either house, making (b) incorrect. The President's assent is mandatory, meaning only (c) is correct.
fingerprint: which of the following statements isare correct regarding the amendment of the constitution of india a parliament has the power to amend any part of the constitution except part iii b a constitution amendment bill can be introduced only in the lok sabha c a constitution amendment bill requires the assent of the president after being passed

question_en: In which event has India won the maximum number of gold medals in the Olympics from the year 1900 to 2020?
question_hi: ओलम्पिक में भारत ने वर्ष 1900 से लेकर 2020 तक किस स्पर्धा में सर्वाधिक स्वर्ण पदक जीते हैं ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: India has a rich history in Olympic hockey, winning 8 gold medals between 1928 and 1980, the highest for the country in any sport.
fingerprint: in which event has india won the maximum number of gold medals in the olympics from the year 1900 to 2020

question_en: What was the slogan of 'Patient Safety Day' observed on 17 September 2022?
question_hi: 17 सितम्बर 2022 को आयोजित ‘रोगी सुरक्षा दिवस’ का नारा क्या था ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: World Patient Safety Day on September 17, 2022, focused on medication safety with the slogan "Medication Without Harm".
fingerprint: what was the slogan of patient safety day observed on 17 september 2022

question_en: Which of the following plastics is used to make electrical switches?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से किस प्लास्टिक का प्रयोग बिजली के स्विच बनाने के लिए किया जाता है ?
subject: general-science
explanation: Bakelite is a thermosetting plastic that is a poor conductor of heat and electricity, making it ideal for electrical switches.
fingerprint: which of the following plastics is used to make electrical switches

question_en: What is the name of the plant group whose plants are naked-seeded, perennial, evergreen, and woody?
question_hi: उस पौध समूह का क्या नाम है, जिसके पौधे नग्नबीजी होते हैं और बहुवर्षी, सदाबहार तथा काष्ठीय होते हैं ?
subject: general-science
explanation: Gymnosperms are a group of seed-producing plants that have naked seeds and are typically woody and evergreen.
fingerprint: what is the name of the plant group whose plants are nakedseeded perennial evergreen and woody

question_en: Which of the following is the correct order?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा सही क्रम है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: In digital storage sizes, the correct descending order from largest to smallest among the given options is Exabyte > Petabyte > Terabyte > Gigabyte.
fingerprint: which of the following is the correct order

question_en: Google, Bing, and Yahoo are examples of which of the following?
question_hi: गूगल, बिंग तथा याहू इनमें से किसके उदाहरण हैं ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Google, Bing, and Yahoo are popular web search engines designed to search for information on the World Wide Web.
fingerprint: google bing and yahoo are examples of which of the following

question_en: Which of the following statements is true about a Uniform Resource Identifier (URI)?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा कथन यूनिफॉर्म रिसोर्स आइडेंटिफायर के बारे में सही है ?
options_en: It is a set of rules by which interconnected web pages on the web can be accessed.
It is a unique address or path for every resource available on the web.
It is a unique value attached to a network adapter.
It is a unique address by which each node of a network can be uniquely identified.
options_hi: यह नियमों का एक समूह है जिसके द्वारा वेब पर आपस में जुड़े हुए वेब पेजों को प्राप्त किया जा सकता है ।
यह वेब पर उपलब्ध प्रत्येक संसाधन के लिए एक यूनीक (अद्वितीय) एड्रेस अथवा पथ है ।
यह नेटवर्क एडैप्टर से जुड़ी एक यूनीक वेल्यू है।
यह एक यूनीक एड्रेस है जिसके द्वारा नेटवर्क के प्रत्येक नोड को अनन्य तरीके से पहचाना जा सकता है ।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: A URI provides a unique address or string of characters used to identify a specific resource over a network, such as the internet.
fingerprint: which of the following statements is true about a uniform resource identifier uri

question_en: Which of the following ensures that the data in a database is accurate and reliable?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से कौन सुनिश्चित करता है कि डाटाबेस में डाटा सटीक (त्रुटिहीन) तथा विश्वसनीय है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Database constraints are rules applied to data columns to enforce data integrity, ensuring accuracy and reliability.
fingerprint: which of the following ensures that the data in a database is accurate and reliable

question_hi: जिस प्रकार ‘ANGLES’ का संबंध ‘GNASEL’ से है, उसी प्रकार ‘SQUARE’ का संबंध किससे होगा ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The word is split into two halves, and each half is reversed. ANG -> GNA, LES -> SEL. Similarly, SQU -> UQS, and ARE -> ERA.

question_hi: निम्नलिखित में भिन्न पद ज्ञात कीजिए।

explanation: Petal makes a flower, finger makes a hand, and brick makes a wall (part-to-whole relationship). An auditorium contains chairs, but a chair is not a structural building block in the same fundamental way.

question_en: Select the number combination according to which the letters can be arranged to form a meaningful word: G N A E H R - 1 2 3 4 5 6
question_hi: ऐसे संख्या संयोजन का चयन कीजिए जिसके अनुसार अक्षरों को व्यवस्थित किए जाने से एक सार्थक शब्द बनाया जा सके : G N A E H R - 1 2 3 4 5 6
subject: reasoning
explanation: Arrangement 5, 3, 2, 1, 4, 6 forms the word HANGER (H=5, A=3, N=2, G=1, E=4, R=6).
fingerprint: select the number combination according to which the letters can be arranged to form a meaningful word g n a e h r 1 2 3 4 5 6

question_en: X Y Z A B C Q R S O P M N J H I # ÷ 1 2 3 4 5 In the given series, which of the following will be the third component to the right of the middle component?
question_hi: X Y Z A B C Q R S O P M N J H I # ÷ 1 2 3 4 5 दी गई श्रृंखला के मध्य घटक से दायीं ओर निम्नलिखित में से तीसरा घटक कौन-सा होगा ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The series has 25 terms. The middle term is the 13th term from the left, which is M. The third term to the right of M is H.

question_en: Which of the following is the odd term? 5, 15, 20, 24, 25
subject: reasoning
explanation: All the numbers 5, 15, 20, and 25 are multiples of 5, except 24.
fingerprint: which of the following is the odd term 5 15 20 24 25

question_en: Three statements are followed by three conclusions. Assuming the statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusion(s) logically follow(s) from the given statements. Statements: Some plates are spoons. Some bowls are plates. All spoons are bowls. Conclusions: (I) Some plates are bowls. (II) Some bowls are spoons. (III) Some spoons are plates.
question_hi: तीन कथनों के बाद तीन निष्कर्ष दिए गए हैं । सामान्यतः ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न होते हुए भी कथनों को सत्य मानते हुए यह निर्णय कीजिए कि तार्किक रूप से कौन-सा/से निष्कर्ष दिए गए कथनों से निकलते हैं। कथन : कुछ प्लेट चम्मच हैं । कुछ कटोरे प्लेट हैं। सभी चम्मच कटोरे हैं। निष्कर्ष : (I) कुछ प्लेट कटोरे हैं । (II) कुछ कटोरे चम्मच हैं। (III) कुछ चम्मच प्लेट हैं।
options_en: All I, II, and III follow
options_hi: केवल I और II निकलते हैं
केवल II और III निकलते हैं
केवल I और III निकलते हैं
सभी I, II और III निकलते हैं
subject: reasoning
explanation: Based on the statements, 'some plates are spoons' implies 'some spoons are plates' (III). 'All spoons are bowls' implies 'some bowls are spoons' (II). Since some plates are spoons and all spoons are bowls, it implies 'some plates are bowls' (I).
fingerprint: three statements are followed by three conclusions assuming the statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts decide which of the conclusions logically follows from the given statements statements some plates are spoons some bowls are plates all spoons are bowls conclusions i some plates are bowls ii some bowls are spoons iii some spoons are plates

question_en: Which number will replace the question mark (?) in the following numerical series? 27, 216, 729, ?, 3375
question_hi: निम्नलिखित संख्यात्मक शृंखला में प्रश्न चिह्न (?) के स्थान पर कौन-सी संख्या आएगी ? 27, 216, 729, ?, 3375
subject: reasoning
explanation: The series consists of cubes of multiples of 3: 3^3=27, 6^3=216, 9^3=729. The next term is 12^3=1728.
fingerprint: which number will replace the question mark in the following numerical series 27 216 729 3375

question_en: You are the owner of a restaurant. Your delivery boy meets with a minor accident in a hurry to deliver food on time. He needs 5 days of rest. Which of the following actions will you take?
question_hi: आप एक रेस्तराँ के मालिक हैं । आपका एक डिलीवरी ब्वॉय समय पर भोजन पहुँचाने की जल्दबाजी में मामूली दुर्घटना का शिकार हो जाता है । उसे 5 दिन के आराम की आवश्यकता है। आप निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी कार्रवाई करेंगे ?
options_en: You will fire him from the job.
You will suspend him for 5 days.
You will ask him to go on leave without pay for 5 days.
You will give him a 5-day paid leave and also pay for his medical expenses.
options_hi: आप उसे नौकरी से निकाल देंगे ।
आप उसे 5 दिन के लिए निलंबित कर देंगे ।
आप उसे 5 दिन के लिए बिना वेतन छुट्टी पर जाने के लिए कहेंगे।
आप उसे 5 दिन का सवेतन अवकाश देंगे और उसके चिकित्सा व्यय का भी भुगतान करेंगे ।
subject: reasoning
explanation: Providing paid leave and medical support is the most ethical management decision for an employee injured during work.
fingerprint: you are the owner of a restaurant your delivery boy meets with a minor accident in a hurry to deliver food on time he needs 5 days of rest which of the following actions will you take

question_en: 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E', and 'F' are six people. 'C' is older than 'D'. 'A' is the youngest. 'B' and 'D' are of the same age. 'B' is older than 'E'. 'C' is younger than 'F'. Who are older than 'B'?
question_hi: ‘A’, ‘B’, ‘C’, ‘D’, ‘E’ और ‘F’ छह व्यक्ति हैं । ‘C’ ‘D’ से बड़ा है । ‘A’ सबसे छोटा है । ‘B’ और ‘D’ बराबर आयु के हैं। ‘B’ ‘E’ से बड़ा है । ‘C’ ‘F’ से छोटा है । ‘B’ से बड़े कौन हैं ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Based on the information, F > C > D = B > E > A. Therefore, the people older than B are F and C.
fingerprint: a b c d e and f are six people c is older than d a is the youngest b and d are of the same age b is older than e c is younger than f who are older than b
